nodes.context: Camorra clan from Quartieri Spagnoli, Naples, involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and illegal lotteries.
Camorra clan that controlled Quartieri Spagnoli before Clan Mariano, allied with Di Biasi and Russo.
Camorra clan from Naples, allied with Cutoliani and Russo, later at war with Clan Mariano.
Camorra clan from Naples, allied with Cutoliani and Di Biasi.
Camorra alliance from Secondigliano, Naples, rival of Clan Mariano in the early 1990s.
Camorra clan, splinter group from Clan Mariano, involved in internal feud.
Camorra clan led by Michele Zaza, affiliated with Emilio Tancredi and Ciro Mariano.
Camorra clan from Naples, allied with Clan Mariano after Marco Mariano's release.
Camorra clan from Cavone area, Naples, allied with Clan Mariano.
Camorra clan from Pallonetto di Santa Lucia, Naples, allied with Clan Mariano.
Camorra clan from Quartieri Spagnoli, led by Salvatore Terracciano, allied with Clan Mariano.
Camorra clan from Quartieri Spagnoli, led by Enrico Ricci, allied with Sarno clan.
Camorra clan from Ponticelli, Naples, allied with Ricci clan.

edges.context: Clan Mariano were gregari (followers) of the Giuliano brothers, who were part of the Cutoliani faction.
Clan Mariano was at war with the Faiano (Di Biasi) clan for control of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Clan Mariano fought the Alleanza di Secondigliano in the early 1990s for control of Quartieri Spagnoli.
Cardillo-Ranieri were scissionists (splinter) from Clan Mariano, leading to a violent internal feud.
Emilio Tancredi, affiliated with Clan Zaza, was considered affiliated with Ciro Mariano.
After Marco Mariano's release, Clan Mariano allied with the Esposito clan.
Clan Mariano allied with the Lepre clan from Cavone.
Clan Mariano allied with the Elia clan from Pallonetto di Santa Lucia.
Clan Mariano allied with Salvatore Terracciano's clan, a historical affiliate.
The Ricci clan is allied with the Sarno clan from Ponticelli.
The Ricci-Sarno alliance opposed Marco Mariano's attempts to regain control of Quartieri Spagnoli.
